summary.zh: 法拉利凭借提前为新的 1.5 升方程式做好准备的「鲨鱼鼻」156 赛车统治全年，菲尔·希尔拿下个人首个、也是唯一一个世界冠军。
summary.en: Ferrari dominated the new 1.5-litre formula's debut season with the "sharknose" 156, prepared well ahead of the rule change; Phil Hill won his first and only world championship.

content.zh: 法拉利凭借提前为新的 1.5 升方程式做好准备的「鲨鱼鼻」156 赛车统治全年，菲尔·希尔拿下个人首个、也是唯一一个世界冠军。
content.en: Ferrari dominated the new 1.5-litre formula's debut season with the "sharknose" 156, prepared well ahead of the rule change; Phil Hill won his first and only world championship.
